name: wan-huiyan-cutify-that-tab
description: Cute, hand-authored SVG favicons for web apps — three techniques, 19 pixel-art mascots, and 13 emotion-variant gradient blobs in a single skill.

plugins.name: cutify-that-tab
plugins.description: Add a cute SVG favicon: emoji, gradient blob (happy / wink / heart-eyes / smug / surprised / starry / kissy / sleepy / anime), or 16×16 pixel-art mascot.
